title: Microbiome Assay with 96WP Updated April 2020
author: Priota Islam
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfrqjm5w

steps.title: Pick 10 L4s onto 10x90mm OP50 seeded platese
steps.instruction: Pick 10 L4s onto 10x90mm OP50 seeded platese.gon Monday (10 L4 per plate so total 100L4s)

steps.title: At 2pm on day of bleaching...
steps.instruction: At 2pm on day of bleaching (eg Friday) follow the protocol Bleach synchronization of C elegans

steps.title: Keep the tube with bleached N2s...
steps.instruction: Keep the tube with bleached N2s on a rotator at 20C incubator until refeed (make sure not to exceed 5days as the worm behaviour is not consistent post this time frame)

steps.title: If tracking is intended to be...
steps.instruction: If tracking is intended to be performed on the following Thursday, then refeed the arrested L1s onto 4 OP50 seeded 150mm plates on the Monday (+72hrs post bleaching, at 2pm following the protocol Bleach synchronization of C elegans

steps.title: Store the refed L1 plates at 20C incubator
steps.instruction: Store the refed L1 plates at 20C incubator

steps.title: At least 2days prior to tracking day (e
steps.instruction: At least 2days prior to tracking day (e.g. Tuesday if tracking is planned on Thursday) make about 250ml no peptone NGM

steps.title: Dispense 200ul of agar into each...
steps.instruction: Dispense 200ul of agar into each well of the 96WP using the integra viafill following the protocol Dispensing agar into multi well plates

steps.title: Let the agar dry and store...
steps.instruction: Let the agar dry and store the plates at 4C (lid side down) until used (plates can be stored for up to a week)-Note:

steps.title: Measure the weight of the plates...
steps.instruction: Measure the weight of the plates with lids on and record average plate weight on day of pouring

steps.title: Grow an overnight culture of the...
steps.instruction: Grow an overnight culture of the bacterial strain from the (shuffled) 96WP library stock plates, 2days prior to tracking (eg on a Tuesday afternoon if tracking is to be intended on Thursday) following the protocol Growing overnight bacterial culture in 96WP.

steps.title: Separately inoculate OP50 and incubate at...
steps.instruction: Separately inoculate OP50 and incubate at 37C overnight in a shaking incubator at 200 rpm

steps.title: Take the bacterial cultures out of...
steps.instruction: Take the bacterial cultures out of the incubators in the morning, and store at 4C until used for seeding later that day

steps.title: Cover the plates with breathable seals...
steps.instruction: Cover the plates with breathable seals and shake at 180-200rpm in a shaking incubator

steps.title: Take agar-filled 96WPs out of the...
steps.instruction: Take agar-filled 96WPs out of the cold room and dry under in the drying cabinet for about 2-3hrs (Measure the weight of 3 plates before drying without the lid)

steps.title: After drying measure the weight of the 3 plates again
steps.instruction: After drying measure the weight of the 3 plates again. Ensure that the plates lose between 3-5% of their original weight following drying.

steps.title: Seed the dried plates with the...
steps.instruction: Seed the dried plates with the bacterial culture grown the night before using the ViaFlo

steps.title: Turn the ViaFlo ON (Make sure to book it beforehand)
steps.instruction: Turn the ViaFlo ON (Make sure to book it beforehand)

steps.title: Edit the protocol SAUL to have...
steps.instruction: Edit the protocol SAUL to have the mixing stage consisting of 15 cycles to initially mix the bacterial cultures and to resuspend each strain

steps.title: Load the tips (long 12ul tips),...
steps.instruction: Load the tips (long 12ul tips), Adjust the Z height to the one that worked best in the test runs (See lab notes)

steps.title: Mix the bacterial plate using the ViaFlo
steps.instruction: Mix the bacterial plate using the ViaFlo

steps.title: Change the tips
steps.instruction: Change the tips

steps.title: Edit protocol SAUL again to have...
steps.instruction: Edit protocol SAUL again to have mixing stage be of 1 cycle when actually seeding plates

steps.title: Run the protocol- To dispense 10ul volume in each well
steps.instruction: Run the protocol- To dispense 10ul volume in each well

steps.title: Change tips every time a new plate is seeded
steps.instruction: Change tips every time a new plate is seeded

steps.title: After all the plates are seeded...
steps.instruction: After all the plates are seeded dry them under the hood for another 1hr

steps.title: After drying put the plates in...
steps.instruction: After drying put the plates in a closed box upside down in the cold room (4C)

steps.title: On the day of tracking prepare...
steps.instruction: On the day of tracking prepare the worms following the protocol Preparing worms for the COPAS (wormsorter)

steps.title: Dispense the worms using the COPAS...
steps.instruction: Dispense the worms using the COPAS following the protocol Using the worm sorter (COPAS)

steps.title: Dry the plates for 30minutes under the hood
steps.instruction: Dry the plates for 30minutes under the hood

steps.title: After drying, place the plates under...
steps.instruction: After drying, place the plates under the Hydra rig, leave for a further 30mins to acclimatize, and then record for 15mins, following the protocol Tracking on the Hydra rigs

steps.title: Record each plate at four time points
steps.instruction: Record each plate at four time points: 1hr, 3hrs, 5hrs, and 23.5hrs (next day). Between 1hr, 3hr & 5hr the plates are kept in the cave outside the rigs

steps.title: Store the plates in 20C incubator...
steps.instruction: Store the plates in 20C incubator overnight between tracking 5hrs and 23.5hrs timepoint

steps.title: Discard the plates in the biological waste bins post tracking
steps.instruction: Discard the plates in the biological waste bins post tracking

steps.title: Record with the lids on and...
steps.instruction: Record with the lids on and lid side facing up inside the rig. Makesure to wipe the lids with lint-free tissues before placing them under the rig. Also use the script that involves using blue light in the recording
